ticket_description: Model is giving completely wrong answers about our product inventory. It's saying we have items in stock that we discontinued 6 months ago.
resolution_notes: Refreshed knowledge base with updated product catalogue. Customer advised to implement periodic retraining schedule.

ticket_description: API calls timing out after 30 seconds when processing large batches
resolution_notes: Increased timeout limit. Recommended async processing for batches >100 items.

ticket_description: Being charged for API calls that returned errors. Shouldn't be billed for failed calls.
resolution_notes: Credits applied. Bug escalated to billing team.

ticket_description: Same question asked twice gets two different answers. This is unacceptable for our compliance use case. We need deterministic outputs.
resolution_notes: Explained temperature settings. Customer set temp=0 but flagged that determinism not fully guaranteed at scale. Escalated to product team.

ticket_description: Response times have doubled in the last week without any changes on our end
Getting 429 errors constantly. We're well within our rate limits according to our dashboard.

satisfaction_score: Model responses show different behaviour depending on whether names in prompts appear to be male or female. This is a serious issue for our HR application.
ticket_description: Confirmed bias patterns in testing. Escalated to model team. Customer offered interim mitigation strategies.
Webhooks not firing when job completes
resolution_notes: Missing trailing slash in endpoint URL. Customer updated config.

ticket_description: Model is confidently citing sources that don't exist. Our legal team is furious. We deployed this for contract review and it fabricated three case references.
resolution_notes: Added explicit instructions to only cite provided documents. Recommended retrieval-augmented approach. Customer very unhappy with initial deployment guidance.

ticket_description: How do I download my invoice?
resolution_notes: Sent invoice download instructions.

ticket_description: Latency issue from TKT-005 returned. Getting 8-12 second response times.
resolution_notes: Identified peak load period. Suggested off-peak scheduling for batch jobs. Monitoring added.

ticket_description: Model seems to forget earlier parts of long conversations. By message 15-20 it's lost context from the beginning.
resolution_notes: Explained context window limits. Recommended conversation summarisation pattern.

ticket_description: API keys stopped working after we rotated them
resolution_notes: Key rotation process explained. New keys working.

ticket_description: Model making up customer names and order numbers in our CRM integration.
Need to process 10,000 documents per hour but max we can get is 3,200
resolution_notes: Explained parallelisation options. Customer needs to upgrade plan for higher concurrency limits.

ticket_description: Getting malformed JSON responses occasionally
resolution_notes: Edge case in response parsing identified. Workaround provided.

satisfaction_score: Our compliance queries are being blocked by content filters. We're a regulated financial institution and need to discuss sensitive but legal topics without constant blocks.
ticket_description: Filters flagging legitimate compliance language. Escalated for custom filter configuration. Enterprise agreement required.
Not sure how to structure prompts for best results. Documentation is confusing.
resolution_notes: Provided prompt engineering guide and examples relevant to customer use case.

ticket_description: Third time reporting response inconsistency. Previous tickets TKT-005 and TKT-011. Temperature is set to 0. This is now a blocker for our production deployment.
Can you explain the difference between the Pro and Enterprise plans?
resolution_notes: Plan comparison sent.

ticket_description: Follow up to TKT-007. Two weeks later and no update. This bias issue is causing real harm in our product. We need an ETA on the fix.
Output sometimes in markdown, sometimes plain text, inconsistent.
resolution_notes: Prompt updated to specify output format explicitly.

ticket_description: Slow responses again. Averaging 15 seconds.
resolution_notes: Load balancing issue identified on infrastructure side. Resolved.

ticket_description: Model hallucinations continuing despite changes from TKT-009. Three weeks and this is still happening in production. We are considering switching providers.
Timeouts on large payloads
resolution_notes: Payload chunking strategy provided.

ticket_description: Still no resolution on TKT-014. Customer escalating to account manager.
How do I get started with fine tuning?
resolution_notes: Fine-tuning documentation and quickstart guide sent.

ticket_description: Outputs are technically correct but very verbose. Customers on our platform are complaining the answers are too long and hard to read.
resolution_notes: Prompt engineering session booked. Added max_tokens and explicit brevity instruction.

ticket_description: Second escalation on content filtering (see TKT-017). Enterprise agreement still in review. This is taking too long.
Different output formats from same prompt on different days.
resolution_notes: Version pinning explained and implemented.

ticket_description: Seeing performance degrade as document length increases
resolution_notes: Context length impact explained. Chunking strategy recommended.

ticket_description: Charged for a month we didn't use the service. We paused our subscription.
resolution_notes: Credit issued. Pause functionality clarified.

ticket_description: Python SDK throwing deprecation warnings
resolution_notes: Updated to latest SDK version.

satisfaction_score: FOURTH report of inconsistency issue (TKT-005, TKT-011, TKT-019). Customer threatening to cancel. Need engineering review urgently.

ticket_description: Model generating fictional customer reviews for our e-commerce platform. This is going live next week.
Need to set up real time notifications when batch processing completes
resolution_notes: Webhook setup walkthrough provided.

satisfaction_score: Bias issue from TKT-007 and TKT-021. Customer has now received formal complaints from their end users. Legal involvement. Three weeks with no meaningful resolution.

ticket_description: Response times now 20+ seconds. Completely unusable.
We are cancelling our subscription (ref TKT-009 TKT-024). Please process cancellation and arrange data export.
Can the model respond in different tones depending on context (formal vs casual)?
resolution_notes: Yes, demonstrated tone control via system prompt configuration.

ticket_description: How do I implement API key rotation securely?
resolution_notes: Security best practices guide provided.

ticket_description: Model listing features our product doesn't have when users ask about capabilities. Very embarrassing in demos.
resolution_notes: System prompt updated to restrict scope to documented features only. Knowledge base grounding recommended.

ticket_description: Unexpected overage charges this month. Usage looked normal to us.
resolution_notes: Usage breakdown provided. Explained token counting includes both input and output.

ticket_description: TKT-017 TKT-029. Enterprise agreement signed 2 weeks ago. Filters still not configured. This has been open 3 weeks.
TKT-035 follow up. Customer went live. Now live with hallucination bug.
Output quality drops significantly for non-English text especially for our German customers
resolution_notes: Multilingual prompt strategies provided. Known limitation for some specialised domains documented.

ticket_description: Intermittent 500 errors about twice a day
resolution_notes: Identified and fixed upstream service issue.

satisfaction_score: Fifth report. TKT-005 TKT-011 TKT-019 TKT-034. Customer has been patient but has now issued formal complaint and is requesting SLA compensation.

ticket_description: Latency from TKT-038 getting worse. Now 30+ seconds. No response to previous ticket.
Can you do a training session for our new team members?
resolution_notes: Training session booked for following week.
